content.text: I'll read all four files for you.

1→'use client' 2→ 3→import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react' 4→import { format, parseISO } from 'date-fns' 5→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase' 6→import OutlineEditor from './OutlineEditor' 7→import Quotes from './Quotes' 8→import type { Book, Quote } from '@/types' 9→ 10→type Tab = 'outline' | 'brainstorm' | 'quotes' 11→type SaveStatus = 'idle' | 'saving' | 'saved' 12→ 13→interface Props { 14→ bookId: string 15→ initialTab?: Tab 16→ onClose: () => void 17→ onDelete: (id: string) => void 18→ onUpdate: () => void 19→} 20→ 21→const inputClass = 'w-full bg-fog-100 border border-fog-300 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-sm text-navy-900 placeholder:text-fog-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-navy-500/20 transition-all' 22→const labelClass = 'block text-xs font-medium text-fog-600 mb-1' 23→ 24→export default function DetailModal({ bookId, initialTab = 'outline', onClose, onDelete, onUpdate }: Props) { 25→ const [book, setBook] = useState(null) 26→ const [notes, setNotes] = useState({ outline: '', scratch: '' }) 27→ const [quotes, setQuotes] = useState([]) 28→ const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true) 29→ const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState(initialTab) 30→ const [saveStatus, setSaveStatus] = useState('idle') 31→ const [editing, setEditing] = useState(false) 32→ const [confirmDelete, setConfirmDelete] = useState(false) 33→ const [savingMeta, setSavingMeta] = useState(false) 34→ const [metaError, setMetaError] = useState('') 35→ 36→ // Edit form state 37→ const [editTitle, setEditTitle] = useState('') 38→ const [editAuthor, setEditAuthor] = useState('') 39→ const [editTotalPages, setEditTotalPages] = useState('') 40→ const [editCurrentPage, setEditCurrentPage] = useState('') 41→ const [editPublication, setEditPublication] = useState('') 42→ const [editArticleDate, setEditArticleDate] = useState('') 43→ const [editShowTitle, setEditShowTitle] = useState('') 44→ const [editGuests, setEditGuests] = useState('') 45→ const [editAirDate, setEditAirDate] = useState('') 46→ 47→ const saveTimer = useRef | null>(null) 48→ 49→ const load = useCallback(async () => { 50→ setLoading(true) 51→ const [bookRes, notesRes, quotesRes] = await Promise.all([ 52→ supabase.from('books').select('*').eq('id', bookId).single(), 53→ supabase.from('book_notes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId), 54→ supabase.from('quotes').select('*').eq('book_id', bookId) 55→ .order('page_number', { ascending: true, nullsFirst: false }) 56→ .order('created_at', { ascending: true }), 57→ ]) 58→ 59→ if (!bookRes.error && bookRes.data) { 60→ const b = bookRes.data as Book 61→ setBook(b) 62→ setEditTitle(b.title ?? '') 63→ setEditAuthor(b.author ?? '') 64→ setEditTotalPages(b.total_pages?.toString() ?? '') 65→ setEditCurrentPage(b.current_page?.toString() ?? '') 66→ setEditPublication(b.publication ?? '') 67→ setEditArticleDate(b.article_date ?? '') 68→ setEditShowTitle(b.show_title ?? '') 69→ setEditGuests(b.guests ?? '') 70→ setEditAirDate(b.air_date ?? '') 71→ } 72→ 73→ const notesMap: Record = {} 74→ for (const note of notesRes.data ?? []) { 75→ notesMap[note.tab] = note.content 76→ } 77→ setNotes({ outline: notesMap.outline ?? '', scratch: notesMap.scratch ?? '' }) 78→ setQuotes((quotesRes.data ?? []).map(q => ({ ...q, tags: q.tags ?? [] })) as Quote[]) 79→ setLoading(false) 80→ }, [bookId]) 81→ 82→ useEffect(() => { load() }, [load]) 83→ 84→ // Update tab when initialTab changes (from URL navigation) 85→ useEffect(() => { setActiveTab(initialTab) }, [initialTab]) 86→ 87→ // Close on Escape 88→ useEffect(() => { 89→ function onKey(e: KeyboardEvent) { 90→ if (e.key === 'Escape') { 91→ if (editing) { setEditing(false); setConfirmDelete(false); setMetaError('') } 92→ else onClose() 93→ } 94→ } 95→ window.addEventListener('keydown', onKey) 96→ return () => window.removeEventListener('keydown', onKey) 97→ }, [onClose, editing]) 98→ 99→ function handleNoteChange(tab: 'outline' | 'scratch', content: string) { 100→ setNotes(n => ({ ...n, [tab]: content })) 101→ setSaveStatus('saving') 102→ if (saveTimer.current) clearTimeout(saveTimer.current) 103→ saveTimer.current = setTimeout(async () => { 104→ await supabase 105→ .from('book_notes') 106→ .upsert({ book_id: bookId, tab, content }, { onConflict: 'book_id,tab' }) 107→ setSaveStatus('saved') 108→ setTimeout(() => setSaveStatus('idle'), 2500) 109→ }, 600) 110→ } 111→ 112→ async function handleSaveMetadata() { 113→ if (!book) return 114→ setSavingMeta(true) 115→ setMetaError('') 116→ 117→ const updates: Record = { 118→ title: editTitle.trim() || book.title, 119→ author: editAuthor.trim() || null, 120→ } 121→ 122→ if (book.type === 'book') { 123→ updates.total_pages = editTotalPages ? Number(editTotalPages) : null 124→ updates.current_page = editCurrentPage ? Number(editCurrentPage) : null 125→ } else if (book.type === 'article') { 126→ updates.publication = editPublication.trim() || null 127→ updates.article_date = editArticleDate.trim() || null 128→ } else if (book.type === 'podcast') { 129→ updates.show_title = editShowTitle.trim() || null 130→ updates.guests = editGuests.trim() || null 131→ updates.air_date = editAirDate.trim() || null 132→ } 133→ 134→ console.log('[DetailModal] saving metadata for book', bookId, updates) 135→ 136→ const res = await fetch(`/api/books/${bookId}`, { 137→ method: 'PATCH', 138→ headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }, 139→ body: JSON.stringify(updates), 140→ }) 141→ 142→ const json = await res.json() 143→ setSavingMeta(false) 144→ 145→ if (!res.ok) { 146→ console.error('[DetailModal] save failed:', json) 147→ setMetaError(json.error ?? 'Save failed — check server logs for details.') 148→ return // keep edit form open 149→ } 150→ 151→ console.log('[DetailModal] save succeeded:', json) 152→ setBook(json as Book) 153→ onUpdate() 154→ setEditing(false) 155→ setConfirmDelete(false) 156→ } 157→ 158→ async function handleDelete() { 159→ await supabase.from('books').delete().eq('id', bookId) 160→ onDelete(bookId) 161→ } 162→ 163→ async function handleExportPDF() { 164→ const res = await fetch(`/api/export/pdf/${bookId}`) 165→ if (!res.ok) return 166→ const blob = await res.blob() 167→ const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob) 168→ const a = document.createElement('a') 169→ a.href = url 170→ a.download = `${book?.title ?? 'notes'}.pdf` 171→ a.click() 172→ URL.revokeObjectURL(url) 173→ } 174→ 175→ const TABS: { key: Tab; label: string }[] = [ 176→ { key: 'outline', label: 'Outline' }, 177→ { key: 'brainstorm', label: 'Brainstorm' }, 178→ { key: 'quotes', label: `Quotes${quotes.length > 0 ? ` (${quotes.length})` : ''}` }, 179→ ] 180→ 181→ // Type badge 182→ function typeBadge(type: string) { 183→ if (type === 'article') return 'bg-navy-100 text-navy-700 border-navy-200' 184→ if (type === 'podcast') return 'bg-ember-100 text-ember-700 border-ember-200' 185→ return 'bg-fog-100 text-fog-600 border-fog-300' 186→ } 187→ function typeLabel(type: string) { 188→ if (type === 'article') return '📰 Article' 189→ if (type === 'podcast') return '🎙️ Podcast' 190→ return '📚 Book' 191→ } 192→ 193→ function renderMetadataDisplay() { 194→ if (!book) return null 195→ const subtitle: string[] = [] 196→ if (book.type === 'book') { 197→ if (book.total_pages) subtitle.push(`${book.current_page ?? 0} / ${book.total_pages} pages`) 198→ } else if (book.type === 'article') { 199→ if (book.publication) subtitle.push(book.publication) 200→ if (book.article_date) subtitle.push(book.article_date) 201→ } else if (book.type === 'podcast') { 202→ if (book.show_title) subtitle.push(book.show_title) 203→ if (book.air_date) subtitle.push(book.air_date) 204→ } 205→ 206→ return ( 207→

1→'use client'
     2→
     3→import { useRef } from 'react'
     4→
     5→interface Props {
     6→  value: string
     7→  onChange: (value: string) => void
     8→  className?: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→// Outline levels: I. → A. → 1. → a. → i.
    12→const LEVELS = [
    13→  { prefix: /^(I{1,3}|IV|V?I{0,3}|IX|X{0,3}|XI{0,3}|XIV|XV|XVI|XVII|XVIII|XIX|XX)\.\s/, next: 'A' },
    14→]
    15→
    16→type LevelKey = 'I' | 'A' | '1' | 'a' | 'i'
    17→
    18→interface Level {
    19→  pattern: RegExp
    20→  nextFn: (current: string) => string
    21→}
    22→
    23→const OUTLINE_LEVELS: Level[] = [
    24→  {
    25→    // Roman numeral: I. II. III. IV. …
    26→    pattern: /^((?:X{0,3})(?:IX|IV|V?I{0,3}))\.\s*/,
    27→    nextFn: incrementRoman,
    28→  },
    29→  {
    30→    // Capital letter: A. B. … Z.
    31→    pattern: /^([A-Z])\.\s*/,
    32→    nextFn: (c) => String.fromCharCode(c.charCodeAt(0) + 1) + '. ',
    33→  },
    34→  {
    35→    // Arabic number: 1. 2. …
    36→    pattern: /^(\d+)\.\s*/,
    37→    nextFn: (c) => (parseInt(c) + 1) + '. ',
    38→  },
    39→  {
    40→    // Lowercase letter: a. b. …
    41→    pattern: /^([a-z])\.\s*/,
    42→    nextFn: (c) => String.fromCharCode(c.charCodeAt(0) + 1) + '. ',
    43→  },
    44→  {
    45→    // Lowercase roman: i. ii. iii. iv. …
    46→    pattern: /^((?:x{0,3})(?:ix|iv|v?i{0,3}))\.\s*/,
    47→    nextFn: incrementLowerRoman,
    48→  },
    49→]
    50→
    51→function romanToInt(r: string): number {
    52→  const vals: Record<string, number> = { i: 1, v: 5, x: 10, l: 50, c: 100, d: 500, m: 1000, I: 1, V: 5, X: 10, L: 50, C: 100, D: 500, M: 1000 }
    53→  let total = 0
    54→  const s = r.toLowerCase()
    55→  for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) {
    56→    const cur = vals[s[i]] ?? 0
    57→    const next = vals[s[i + 1]] ?? 0
    58→    total += cur < next ? -cur : cur
    59→  }
    60→  return total
    61→}
    62→
    63→function intToRoman(num: number, upper = true): string {
    64→  const vals = [1000, 900, 500, 400, 100, 90, 50, 40, 10, 9, 5, 4, 1]
    65→  const syms = upper
    66→    ? ['M', 'CM', 'D', 'CD', 'C', 'XC', 'L', 'XL', 'X', 'IX', 'V', 'IV', 'I']
    67→    : ['m', 'cm', 'd', 'cd', 'c', 'xc', 'l', 'xl', 'x', 'ix', 'v', 'iv', 'i']
    68→  let result = ''
    69→  for (let i = 0; i < vals.length; i++) {
    70→    while (num >= vals[i]) { result += syms[i]; num -= vals[i] }
    71→  }
    72→  return result
    73→}
    74→
    75→function incrementRoman(current: string): string {
    76→  return intToRoman(romanToInt(current) + 1, true) + '. '
    77→}
    78→
    79→function incrementLowerRoman(current: string): string {
    80→  return intToRoman(romanToInt(current) + 1, false) + '. '
    81→}
    82→
    83→function getIndent(line: string): number {
    84→  let count = 0
    85→  for (const ch of line) {
    86→    if (ch === '\t') count++
    87→    else break
    88→  }
    89→  return count
    90→}
    91→
    92→function getNextPrefix(lines: string[], currentLineIndex: number, indent: number): string {
    93→  const indentStr = '\t'.repeat(indent)
    94→  const levelIdx = indent % OUTLINE_LEVELS.length
    95→
    96→  for (let i = currentLineIndex - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    97→    const stripped = lines[i].slice(indent)
    98→    if (getIndent(lines[i]) === indent && stripped.length > 0) {
    99→      const level = OUTLINE_LEVELS[levelIdx]
   100→      const m = stripped.match(level.pattern)
   101→      if (m) {
   102→        return indentStr + level.nextFn(m[1])
   103→      }
   104→      break
   105→    }
   106→  }
   107→
   108→  const level = OUTLINE_LEVELS[levelIdx]
   109→  const firstPrefixes = ['I. ', 'A. ', '1. ', 'a. ', 'i. ']
   110→  return indentStr + firstPrefixes[levelIdx]
   111→}
   112→
   113→export default function OutlineEditor({ value, onChange, className }: Props) {
   114→  const ref = useRef<HTMLTextAreaElement>(null)
   115→
   116→  function handleKeyDown(e: React.KeyboardEvent<HTMLTextAreaElement>) {
   117→    const ta = ref.current
   118→    if (!ta) return
   119→
   120→    const start = ta.selectionStart
   121→    const end = ta.selectionEnd
   122→    const text = ta.value
   123→
   124→    if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) {
   125→      e.preventDefault()
   126→
   127→      const before = text.slice(0, start)
   128→      const after = text.slice(end)
   129→      const lines = before.split('\n')
   130→      const currentLine = lines[lines.length - 1]
   131→      const indent = getIndent(currentLine)
   132→      const strippedCurrent = currentLine.slice(indent)
   133→
   134→      const levelIdx = indent % OUTLINE_LEVELS.length
   135→      const level = OUTLINE_LEVELS[levelIdx]
   136→      const m = strippedCurrent.match(level.pattern)
   137→
   138→      let newPrefix: string
   139→      if (m && strippedCurrent.length > m[0].length) {
   140→        newPrefix = getNextPrefix(lines, lines.length, indent)
   141→      } else if (m && strippedCurrent.length === m[0].length) {
   142→        const newBefore = before.slice(0, before.length - currentLine.length)
   143→        const newText = newBefore + '\n' + after
   144→        onChange(newText)
   145→        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   146→          if (!ta) return
   147→          const pos = newBefore.length + 1
   148→          ta.selectionStart = pos
   149→          ta.selectionEnd = pos
   150→        })
   151→        return
   152→      } else {
   153→        newPrefix = '\t'.repeat(indent)
   154→      }
   155→
   156→      const newText = before + '\n' + newPrefix + after
   157→      onChange(newText)
   158→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   159→        if (!ta) return
   160→        const pos = start + 1 + newPrefix.length
   161→        ta.selectionStart = pos
   162→        ta.selectionEnd = pos
   163→      })
   164→      return
   165→    }
   166→
   167→    if (e.key === 'Tab') {
   168→      e.preventDefault()
   169→      const before = text.slice(0, start)
   170→      const after = text.slice(end)
   171→      const lines = before.split('\n')
   172→      const currentLine = lines[lines.length - 1]
   173→      const indent = getIndent(currentLine)
   174→
   175→      if (e.shiftKey) {
   176→        if (indent === 0) return
   177→        const newIndent = indent - 1
   178→        const strippedLine = currentLine.slice(indent)
   179→        const newLines = [...lines]
   180→        newLines[newLines.length - 1] = '\t'.repeat(newIndent) + strippedLine
   181→        const newBefore = newLines.join('\n')
   182→        const newText = newBefore + after
   183→        onChange(newText)
   184→        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   185→          if (!ta) return
   186→          const pos = newBefore.length
   187→          ta.selectionStart = pos
   188→          ta.selectionEnd = pos
   189→        })
   190→      } else {
   191→        const newIndent = indent + 1
   192→        const strippedLine = currentLine.slice(indent)
   193→
   194→        const allLines = text.split('\n')
   195→        const currentLineIndexInAll = before.split('\n').length - 1
   196→
   197→        const deeperPrefix = getNextPrefix(allLines, currentLineIndexInAll, newIndent)
   198→
   199→        const existing = OUTLINE_LEVELS[indent % OUTLINE_LEVELS.length]
   200→        const mExisting = strippedLine.match(existing.pattern)
   201→        const contentAfterPrefix = mExisting ? strippedLine.slice(mExisting[0].length) : strippedLine
   202→
   203→        const newLine = deeperPrefix + contentAfterPrefix
   204→        const newLines = [...lines]
   205→        newLines[newLines.length - 1] = newLine
   206→        const newBefore = newLines.join('\n')
   207→        const newText = newBefore + after
   208→        onChange(newText)
   209→        requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   210→          if (!ta) return
   211→          const pos = newBefore.length
   212→          ta.selectionStart = pos
   213→          ta.selectionEnd = pos
   214→        })
   215→      }
   216→    }
   217→  }
   218→
   219→  return (
   220→    <textarea
   221→      ref={ref}
   222→      value={value}
   223→      onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)}
   224→      onKeyDown={handleKeyDown}
   225→      placeholder="Structure your notes here — use Enter to continue the list, Tab to indent (I. → A. → 1. → a. → i.)"
   226→      className={className ?? 'w-full h-[calc(100vh-200px)] resize-none bg-fog-100 rounded-xl border border-fog-300 px-5 py-4 text-sm text-navy-900 leading-relaxed placeholder:text-fog-400 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-navy-500/20 transition-all font-mono'}
   227→    />
   228→  )
   229→}
   230→

i < tag.length; i++) { 23→ hash = (hash * 31 + tag.charCodeAt(i)) & 0xffffffff 24→ } 25→ return TAG_PALETTES[Math.abs(hash) % TAG_PALETTES.length] 26→} 27→ 28→// ── Copy button ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 29→ 30→function CopyButton({ text }: { text: string }) { 31→ const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false) 32→ 33→ async function handleCopy() { 34→ await navigator.clipboard.writeText(text) 35→ setCopied(true) 36→ setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000) 37→ } 38→ 39→ return ( 40→ 62→ ) 63→} 64→ 65→// ── Tag input ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── 66→ 67→function TagInput({ 68→ tags, 69→ onChange, 70→}: { 71→ tags: string[] 72→ onChange: (tags: string[]) => void 73→}) { 74→ const [input, setInput] = useState('') 75→ const inputRef = useRef(null) 76→ 77→ function addTag(raw: string) { 78→ const tag = raw.trim().toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, '-') 79→ if (!tag || tags.includes(tag)) { 80→ setInput('') 81→ return 82→ } 83→ onChange([...tags, tag]) 84→ setInput('') 85→ } 86→ 87→ function handleKeyDown(e: React.KeyboardEvent) { 88→ if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ',') { 89→ e.preventDefault() 90→ addTag(input) 91→ } 92→ if (e.key === 'Backspace' && !input && tags.length > 0) { 93→ onChange(tags.slice(0, -1)) 94→ } 95→ } 96→ 97→ return ( 98→

1→export type BookStatus = 'active' | 'completed' | 'paused' | 'queued'
     2→export type BookType = 'book' | 'article' | 'podcast'
     3→export type NoteTab = 'outline' | 'scratch'
     4→
     5→export interface Book {
     6→  id: string
     7→  title: string
     8→  type: BookType
     9→  author: string | null
    10→  // Book-specific
    11→  current_page: number | null
    12→  total_pages: number | null
    13→  // Article-specific
    14→  publication: string | null
    15→  article_date: string | null
    16→  // Podcast-specific
    17→  show_title: string | null
    18→  guests: string | null
    19→  air_date: string | null
    20→  // Common
    21→  sessions_per_week: number | null
    22→  sort_order: number | null
    23→  status: BookStatus
    24→  date_finished: string | null // YYYY-MM-DD
    25→  created_at: string
    26→  updated_at: string
    27→}
    28→
    29→export interface BookNote {
    30→  id: string
    31→  book_id: string
    32→  tab: NoteTab
    33→  content: string
    34→  updated_at: string
    35→}
    36→
    37→export interface Quote {
    38→  id: string
    39→  book_id: string
    40→  quote_text: string
    41→  page_number: number | null
    42→  tags: string[]
    43→  heading_id: string | null
    44→  sort_order: number | null
    45→  created_at: string
    46→}
    47→
    48→export interface Connection {
    49→  id: string
    50→  source_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    51→  source_id: string
    52→  target_type: 'quote' | 'note'
    53→  target_id: string
    54→  note: string | null
    55→  created_at: string
    56→  // joined
    57→  target_book?: Book
    58→  target_quote?: Quote
    59→  target_note?: BookNote
    60→}
    61→
    62→// Search result types
    63→export type SearchResultType = 'quote' | 'note'
    64→
    65→export interface SearchResult {
    66→  type: SearchResultType
    67→  id: string
    68→  bookId: string
    69→  bookTitle: string
    70→  content: string
    71→  tags?: string[]
    72→  pageNumber?: number | null
    73→  tab?: NoteTab
    74→}
